div.h1: Bytecode VM: Frame Stack Growth Pattern

p.strong: Engineering Specification: Memory Layout, Call Semantics, and Operand Stack Mechanics

g.text: Base of locals in Operand Stack

ul.li: Operand Stack grows upwards (to higher addresses).
Call Stack is a fixed-size array of pointers into the operand stack.
Page Boundaries: Bold lines every 4096 bytes.
Cache Alignment: Structs are padded to 64 bytes.

g.title: u32 version, u32 entry, u32 flags
u32 version, u32 entry, u32 flags
